patterns.label: Meeting Notes & Action Item Capture

patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 55: +40 occ (ADO Streams freq=30 + Cross-Source DevOps freq=10). +1.5hr. HIGH-VOLUME, LOW-INTERACTION confirmed — 30 notifications/week, 60min handling. DEEP SATURATION at 873 occ. Decomposition into 5 workstream sub-classifiers CRITICAL — overdue 16+ cycles. Highest automation score (95).

patterns.label: Recurring Meeting Agenda Preparation
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 55: +8 occ from V-Team Cross-Org Syncs (3) and Loop Documents as Coordination Hubs (5). +3.5hr. STABLE. 12 confirmed recurring meeting types. Loop docs serve as living agenda/summary hubs, referenced across meetings and chats.

patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 55: +3 occ from Leadership/Program Announcements (EvalCon announcement, internal previews). +0.5hr. STABLE. Broadcast → Teams discussion → action item pattern confirmed. Passive digest intake consistent.

patterns.label: Meeting Transcript to Summary to Loop/PPT Pipeline

patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 55: +4 occ from Security/Compliance Alerts (Purview, DLP, credentials/keys file alerts). +0.33hr. STABLE. Pattern: alert → manual file fix. Six alert categories: File Blocked, Admin elevation/revocation, Loop workspace, Purview, Digital Compliance, Open Source.

RISING. BSI 87 CRITICAL. PM sole DRI for 8+ request types. Pattern: question → conceptual answer → link to repo/doc → offer meeting.

patterns.label: Knowledge Forum Facilitation & Expert Redirect
patterns.llmRationale: NEW cycle 55. CAPE Architecture Call, Copilot Studio Office Hours, BizChat Offline Eval Office Hour (freq=3, 180min). Repeating facilitation pattern: listen → ask clarifying questions → redirect to docs or follow-up sync. High participant reach. Distinct from copilot-platform-faq-responder (async Q&A) — this is synchronous forum facilitation at scale. Automatable as pre-built answer packs + redirect decision tree.

patterns.label: Peer Mentorship & Concept Translation to Mental Models
patterns.llmRationale: NEW cycle 55. Mentorship and Peer Sense-Making signal (Teams, freq=5, 60min). Pattern: colleague confusion about eval-driven development/orchestration/models → expert explains → shared mental model forms. HIGH VALUE: scales rare expertise to broader team. Adjacent to eval-coaching-and-scoping but distinct — this is conceptual translation for non-experts. Automation: codified concept explainers with worked examples.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Ingests meeting transcript, agenda, or Loop doc; emits structured action items with owner/due-date, decisions log, follow-up email draft, and ADO task stubs. Chain head for transcript-to-loop and post-meeting-external-followup downstream. 339 occurrences across 55 unbroken cycles.
triggerExamples: Extract action items from today's Camp AIR standup and update the Loop doc
Summarize external customer meeting into Loop page with owners and due dates
Create standardized 1:1 notes template for all recurring meetings
Generate post-meeting recap broadcast from CAPE Architecture Call
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces ~67.70 hrs across 4 roles. 339 occ over 55 cycles. Chain head for 2 downstream patterns. Est. ~$175,820/yr.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Classifies ADO notification emails by work-item type (Task, Requirement, Bug, Feature, Epic), workstream prefix, and urgency. Routes action-required to correct role; auto-archives FYI. DEEP SATURATION at 873 occ. Highest automation score (95). Decomposition into 5 workstream sub-classifiers CRITICAL.
triggerExamples: Triage my ADO inbox — what needs action vs FYI?
Classify ADO notifications by workstream: IcM vs coverage vs AI Eval
Which Bug/Requirement notifications require PM response before EOD?
Route this Task notification to the correct DRI based on workstream prefix
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates ~31.84 hrs. 873 occ SATURATED at 40/week. Highest automation (95). Est. ~$82,784/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-report-synthesizer
candidateSkills.description: Ingests eval results, strategy discussions, actionability brainstorms, and customer donated evals. Produces standardized reports with gap analysis. RISING trend. 438 occurrences, 5 participants. Highest value score in catalog (95). EvalCon deadline amplifying urgency.
triggerExamples: Synthesize eval progress from CAPE leadership threads and customer donated evals discussion
Generate eval strategy and actionability analysis from Deep Technical Working Session notes
Prepare Golden Evals kickoff report from meeting transcript
Create eval strategy overview merging Teams threads and meeting artifacts
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~110.89 hrs across 5 roles. Highest value score (95). RISING. Est. ~$288,314/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-template-scaffolder
candidateSkills.description: Scaffolds eval framework templates, scenario libraries, and coverage models. Spawned customer-enablement-asset-standardization. 183 occurrences. STABLE across 52 cycles since first seen at cycle 3.
triggerExamples: Generate an eval template for a 3-intent Copilot Studio agent
Scaffold a coverage model for BizChat offline evaluation
Create scenario library structure for Golden Evals framework
Build eval coverage matrix for SEVAL agent quality assessment
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~55.46 hrs across 4 roles. 183 occ STABLE. Spawns customer enablement. Est. ~$144,196/yr.

candidateSkills.name: weekly-status-report-generator
candidateSkills.description: Generates standardized weekly status reports from Loop docs, Teams threads, email updates, and meeting notes. Resolves 5-format parallel creation gap. RISING trend. 152 occurrences, 4 participants. V-Team Cross-Org Syncs now confirmed primary trigger.
triggerExamples: Generate this week's CAPE eval status merging all sources
Draft unified XFN Report Out from parallel Teams posts this week
Create EOD debrief template for Camp AIR daily standup follow-up
Refresh weekly status from Loop doc, Teams, and email summaries
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~43.64 hrs across 4 roles. 152 occ RISING. 5 parallel formats. Est. ~$113,464/yr.
